title: Smoke test - please reject me
last_update: Rejected: this entry is a smoke test that explicitly asks to be rejected, so no feature work was done. The end-to-end loop (dispatch, worker start, decision, state update) worked as intended.
reason: This is a smoke-test entry, not a real feature request — its own text says it exists only to prove the loop runs end to end and asks to be rejected. Rejecting it as requested; no code was changed.

log.m: Smoke-test request that asks to be rejected; rejected as requested, no code changed.
